mechanism_narrative: A rise in the housing market signal, as indicated by a 20-day increase in HOUST, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing boom periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate signal, as indicated by a 20-day increase in UNRATE, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in labor market tightening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in industrial production signal, as indicated by a 20-day increase in INDPRO, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in supply-side boom periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods demand signal, as indicated by a 20-day decrease in RSAFS, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in goods demand contraction periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor force participation rate signal, as indicated by a 20-day increase in PAYEMS, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in labor market expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy signal, as indicated by a 20-day decrease in FEDFUNDS, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in monetary easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the GDP demand signal, as indicated by a 20-day increase in GDPC1, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDP demand expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the industrial production signal, as indicated by a 20-day decrease in INDPRO, predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in supply-side contraction periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
